seoTitle: Wandal vs Wangan — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Wandal and Wangan. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Wandal and Wangan.
heading: Wandal vs Wangan — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Wandal, Queensland and Wangan, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Wangan has a lower overall climate risk score (26/100) compared to Wandal (27/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Wandal or Wangan safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Wandal has a flood risk score of 26/100, while Wangan scores 40/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Wandal scores 36/100 for bushfire risk. Wangan scores 18/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Wandal or Wangan?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Wangan has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area face minimal climate value impact based on current projections.
